field9: Monitoring period 01/01/2025-30/06/2025 for Verra VCS 3599 (Grouped Projects for Safe Drinking Water for Schools in Viet Nam). field3=Baseline Emissions, field4=Project Emissions, field5=Leakage. field6 (Emission Reductions) is computed by the policy's calculate_report_fields block = (field3-field4-field5)*0.89 = 137171.25 tCO2e.
